rulings.Case Title: PETER PEDRETTI et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 10, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute is continued on the court's own motion to November 12, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
